title: How does Solicitor General Tushar Mehta find time to write books? CJI Surya Kant has a theory
description: Solicitor General Tushar Mehta may be secretly writing humorous stories in court while judges continue flipping through bulky case briefs, Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant said in lighter vein on Sunday.The Chief Justice was speaking at Bharat Mandapam in New Delhi during the launch of Mehta’s first two books, The Bench, the Bar and the Bizarre and The Lawful and the Awful.Union Home Minister Amit Shah and Attorney General R Venkataramani&
